headline: Should SLB’s (SLB) New Digital Marketplace Strategy Reshape How Investors View Its Platform Ambitions?
summary: In June 2026, SLB launched the SLB Digital Marketplace, a curated platform offering around 200 certified AI agents, domain models, data connectors, and digital applications for energy companies across its Delfi and Lumi environments. This move deepens SLB’s open platform approach by turning its Tela agentic AI assistant into a hub where partners, developers, and customers can distribute interoperable digital tools through a single, governed channel. Next, we’ll examine how this curated...
